name: @forwardimpact/librc
description: Service lifecycle management — start, stop, and check services without manual oversight.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: A service fails on a customer machine or an agent session goes sideways — the cause is a missing precondition, an unmanaged process, invisible telemetry, or instructions that drifted from reality.
jobs.bigHire: make platform behavior predictable: preflight checks before anything heavy runs, supervised processes, structured telemetry, and instruction layers that stay honest.
jobs.littleHire: start, stop, or check a service without remembering its specific incantation.
jobs.competesWith: failing deep in execution instead of at startup; ad-hoc process management; console.log debugging; instruction files nobody validates
